description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


* New: Grouped accounts can now carry an ownership percentage, so a jointly held account or portfolio can be split by member.
* New: Added Move left/right actions to reorder dashboard views and columns.
* New: For unrecognized PDFs, the import wizard now shows the document alongside a transaction editor, so you can enter the transaction manually using copy and paste.
* Improvement: Enhanced PDF importers for Interactive Brokers Flex, PostFinance, Trade Republic, UniCredit, and WirBank.
* Improvement: Icons for inactive accounts and securities are now consistently marked as inactive, using either a gray or a faded (semi-transparent) icon.
* Improvement: Added an option to disable value coloring for indicator and ratio widgets.
* Improvement: Taxonomy pie and donut views are now created on demand for better performance.
